summary: Comprehensive testing of suburban expansion (Paris + petite couronne 92/93/94). All backend APIs (24/24) passed. Frontend fully operational with dynamic zone labels for both Paris (arrondissement) and suburbs (commune name).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/address/search?q=92200 returns Neuilly-sur-Seine results with postal_code 92200
Backend: GET /api/address/search?q=avenue charles de gaulle neuilly returns 92xxx results
Backend: GET /api/address/search?q=boulogne returns 92100 Boulogne-Billancourt
Backend: GET /api/address/search?q=montreuil 93 returns 93100 Montreuil
Backend: GET /api/address/search?q=vincennes 94 returns 94300 Vincennes
Backend: GET /api/address/search filters out non-IDF results (only 75/92/93/94)
Backend: GET /api/address/search?q=rue de rivoli paris returns 75xxx results (NO REGRESSION)
Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate for Neuilly (92200) returns zone_label='Neuilly-sur-Seine'
Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate for Neuilly (92200) returns is_paris=False
Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate for Neuilly (92200) returns comparables
Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate for Paris (75004) returns zone_label='04e arrondissement' (NO REGRESSION)
Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate for Paris (75004) returns is_paris=True (NO REGRESSION)
Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate for Montreuil (93100) returns zone_label='Montreuil'
Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate for Vincennes (94300) returns zone_label='Vincennes'
Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate returns circle_stats with circle_1_count, circle_2_count, circle_3_count, reliability
Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate comparables have circle field (1, 2, or 3)
Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate reliability is HAUTE/MOYENNE/BASSE
Backend: GET /api/report/pdf/{id} returns valid PDF
Backend: GET /api/report/pdf/nonexistent returns 404
Backend: POST /api/valuation/recalculate works with excluded comparables
Backend: POST /api/valuation/recalculate with nonexistent ID returns 404
Backend: Paris 75004 classified as 'central' zone
Backend: Neuilly 92200 classified as 'intermediate' zone (premium suburb)
Backend: Créteil 94000 classified as 'peripheral' zone
Frontend: Landing page loads with navigation links
Frontend: NewValuation form address input placeholder includes 'Neuilly' example
Frontend: NewValuation form label shows 'Arrondissement / Ville' (dynamic)
Frontend: Selecting Neuilly address fills postal_code='92200' and arrondissement='Neuilly-sur-Seine'
Frontend: Selecting Paris address fills arrondissement='04' (Paris format)
Frontend: Results page for Neuilly shows 'Ce bien est estimé au-dessus de la moyenne (Neuilly-sur-Seine)'
Frontend: Results page for Paris shows 'Ce bien est estimé au-dessus de la moyenne (04e arrondissement)'
Frontend: HypothesesPanel uses marketData.zone_label for display
Frontend: MarketPosition shows 'Moy. Neuilly-sur-Seine' for suburbs (dynamic zone_label)
Frontend: MarketPosition shows 'Moy. 04e arrondissement' for Paris (dynamic zone_label)
Frontend: Comparables tab shows circle badges (C1: 3, C2: 17, C3: 10)
Frontend: Reliability indicator (Fiabilité) renders correctly
Frontend: PDF download button works
Frontend: ListingAnalyzer page loads with upload zone
critical_code_review_comments: ZONE_AVG_PRICES now has ~70 postal codes covering Paris + petite couronne (92/93/94)
_COMMUNE_NAMES dictionary maps postal codes to commune names for display
_zone_display_label() returns 'XXe arrondissement' for Paris and commune name for suburbs
Address search filters results to only 75/92/93/94 postal codes
Frontend dynamically sets arrondissement field: '04' for Paris, 'Neuilly-sur-Seine' for suburbs
seed_data_creation: Created test valuations for Neuilly (92200), Paris (75004), Montreuil (93100), Vincennes (94300)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Suburban expansion fully tested. Key features: (1) Address search returns 92/93/94 results, (2) Valuation estimate returns zone_label (commune name for suburbs, 'XXe arrondissement' for Paris), (3) is_paris field distinguishes Paris from suburbs, (4) Circle badges (C1/C2/C3) render on Comparables tab, (5) Reliability indicator shows HAUTE/MOYENNE/BASSE. Test valuations created for Neuilly, Paris, Montreuil, Vincennes.
